title: alternanthera hirtula var. hirsuta
intro: Alternanthera hirtula var. hirsuta, also known as the hairy joyweed or hairy copperleaf, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the amaranth family and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Alternanthera hirtula var. hirsuta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, and provide relief from joint pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
